system.flavor: Nothing less than perfect will do for those that soar above. Tear your foes with your talons and shriek victory.
system.effect:
Trigger excel or score a critical hit.
Effect may re-roll the same attack roll, including all modifiers, then check the below. This counts as an effect and not an attack, and only applies the below effects - no damage or effects of the original attack. Hit, excel, and critical hit effects are cumulative.
• Miss are dazed and end your turn.
• Hit 2 damage to your target again and gain 2 vigor.
• Excel damage and vigor by +1d3.
• Critical hit damage and vigor by a further +1d6 instead.
Effect vigor and damage if you're in crisis.
